# PAIRIS optional Rosetta binding-energy environment (conda env name: "rosetta").
# Used only when run_rosetta_analysis: true (bin/rosetta_energy_analysis.py).
# Tested with Python 3.12.11 on Rocky Linux 8.10.
polars==1.32.3
biopython==1.85

# PyRosetta is NOT available on PyPI and requires a (free for academic use)
# Rosetta license — see THIRD_PARTY_LICENSES.md. Install it from the
# RosettaCommons conda channel into this environment, e.g.:
#
#   conda install -c https://conda.rosettacommons.org pyrosetta
#
# Tested: pyrosetta==2025.25+release.a0cefad01b
